hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get("tool_input", {}).get("file_path", ""))' | { read -r file_path; if printf '%s' "$file_path" | grep -Eq '^openspec/changes/[^/]+/tasks\.md$'; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/workflow/scripts/tasks-sync.sh >/dev/null; fi; }

python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(data.get("tool_input", {}).get("file_path", ""))' | { read -r file_path; if printf '%s' "$file_path" | grep -Eq '(^openspec/changes/[^/]+/verification\.md$|^workflow/state/status\.md$|^workflow/state/reports/.*\.md$)'; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/workflow/scripts/post-impl-check.sh --quiet || true; fi; }
